task_completion.description: Verify that a new ground station named 'Santiago_Valley' has been created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a ground station list or configuration window in GPredict showing the name 'Santiago_Valley'.

task_completion.description: Verify the ground station coordinates, altitude, and minimum elevation are set correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Edit Ground Station' or similar properties window showing Latitude: 33.4489 S (or -33.4489), Longitude: 70.6693 W (or -70.6693), Altitude: 570m, and Minimum Elevation: 15 degrees.

task_completion.description: Verify that a tracking module named 'Fire_Orbits' is created and assigned to the 'Santiago_Valley' ground station.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a module window or tab named 'Fire_Orbits' with 'Santiago_Valley' listed as its active ground station in the module properties or UI header.

task_completion.description: Verify that the required satellites are added to the 'Fire_Orbits' module.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for SUOMI NPP, NOAA 19, METOP-B, and METOP-C in the list of tracked satellites within the 'Fire_Orbits' module configuration or active tracking list.

task_completion.description: Verify that the module's map display is configured to show the satellite footprint and a 1-orbit ground track.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the module's map properties/settings window showing 'Show footprint' checked and 'Ground track' set to 1 orbit, OR observe the actual map view displaying a single orbit line and footprint circles for the satellites.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the GPredict graphical user interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the GPredict application windows and dialogs being actively used, rather than just terminal commands editing configuration files.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not simply type the answers into a text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: The configuration must be visible within GPredict's actual interface, not a notepad or text editor displaying the task description.

integrity.description: Verify the agent genuinely entered the settings into the application dialogs.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for screenshots showing the agent typing or clicking within the 'New Ground Station' and 'Module Properties' dialog boxes in GPredict.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Ground Station 'Santiago_Valley' must be configured with Latitude: -33.4489 (or 33.4489 S), Longitude: -70.6693 (or 70.6693 W), Altitude: 570m, Minimum Elevation: 15 degrees. The required satellites to track are SUOMI NPP (NORAD 37849), NOAA 19 (NORAD 33591), METOP-B (NORAD 38771), and METOP-C (NORAD 43689).
